Issue: Input spatial dimensions must be divisible by 2 ** (len(blocks_down) - 1) for SegResNetDS class
Decision: Add spatial shape constraint documentation to SegResNetDS class docstring
Rationale: To clarify input shape constraints and provide worked examples for validation via shape_factor() and is_valid_shape() methods
Author: Talhax55z
